channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Rolling the dice on his way to Las Vegas, Trae Young shows he's always a safe bet at MSG
item.description: Trae Young was dribbling out the clock when he leaned down toward New York's center-court logo and pretended he was shooting dice.
item.dc:creator: Brian Mahoney, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Bill Belichick, University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill finalize coaching deal: reports
item.description: Bill Belichick has reportedly been tapped as the next head coach for the University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill.
item.dc:creator: Brayden Stamps, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Hawks rally for a 108-100 victory over the Knicks and a trip to the NBA Cup semifinals
item.description: Trae Young had 22 points and 11 assists, De’Andre Hunter and Jalen Johnson outplayed the Knicks frontcourt and the Atlanta Hawks took their surprising NBA Cup run all the way to the semifinals in Las Vegas, beating New York 108-100 on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Brian Mahoney, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: WNBA and players' union meet to discuss new CBA
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The WNBA and the league's players union met in person Wednesday to discuss a new collective bargaining agreement.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Cal stunner: Quarterback Fernando Mendoza enters transfer portal a week before LA Bowl
item.description: Bears coach Justin Wilcox expressed disappointment that he couldn't convince Mendoza to remain Cal's quarterback.
item.dc:creator: Jon Becker, The Mercury News

item.title: Do the Rangers even care? They don't look like they do
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- There is no other way to cut it. The Rangers stink. GM Chris Drury is in crisis mode. They have lost 8 of 10. Drury has sent a memo to the rest of the league saying the Blueshirts are open for business, but that had little impact.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Made in America: McKennie and Weah link up for goal to help Juventus beat City
item.description: TURIN, Italy (AP) — Weston McKennie waved an imaginary wand and American compatriot Tim Weah joined in with him in the celebration.
item.dc:creator: DANIELLA MATAR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Juan Soto gets free luxury suite and up to 4 premium tickets for home games in $765M Mets deal
item.description: Juan Soto gets free use of a luxury suite and up to four premium tickets behind home plate for regular-season and postseason New York Mets home games as part of his record $765 million, 15-year contract.
item.dc:creator: Ronald Blum, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Girls Basketball: Bishop's 60, Olympian 34
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Girls hoops on Tuesday night with Olympian playing at Bishop's. The Knights were lead by Moana Peterson, junior guard poured in 15 and added a few steals. Also chipped with quite a few assists as well. Final score in this one Bishop's won 60-34.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: What’s next for SF Giants after signing Adames? Posey admits there are more roster holes to fill
item.description: The Giants signed Adames to a franchise-record $182 million deal but still have more moves to make this offseason.
item.dc:creator: Justice delos Santos, The Mercury News

item.title: Ohio lawmaker proposes bill to make ‘flag planting’ in Ohio State stadium a felony
item.description: Days after the postgame melee between the Michigan and Ohio State football teams, an Ohio state lawmaker has introduced a new bill that would make “flag planting” within Ohio Stadium a felony criminal offense.
item.dc:creator: Matt Jaworowski, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rocky Colavito, 9-time All-Star outfielder and one of Cleveland's most popular athletes, dies at 91
item.description: Rocky Colavito, a wildly popular outfielder who was involved in one of the most debated trades in Cleveland sports history, has died. He was 91.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC

item.title: In an NFL season filled with close games, no one wins more than the Chiefs
item.description: Inside the Numbers dives into NFL statistics, streaks and trends each week. For more Inside the Numbers, head here. ___ In a season on pace for a record number of close games, no team has been better at pulling them out late than the two-time defending champion Kansas City Chiefs.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lanier scores 22 points as No. 1 Tennessee beats Miami 75-62 at Jimmy V Classic
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Chaz Lanier scored 22 points, and No. 1 Tennessee beat struggling Miami 75-62 on Tuesday night at the Jimmy V Classic in Madison Square Garden. Igor Milicic Jr.
item.dc:creator: LARRY FLEISHER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Buccaneers & Habitat Hillsborough join forces for Holiday Home Build and Revival
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers and Habitat for Humanity of Hillsborough joined forces once again to address affordable housing in Hillsborough County.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Joe Burrow's home reportedly broken in to Monday night during game
item.description: According to WLWT, Joe Burrow's Anderson Township, Ohio home was broken into and confirmed by the Hamilton County Sheriff's Office.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: 49ers beat the Bears 38-13 to snap 3-game skid
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — After weeks of shaky play, the San Francisco 49ers got back to their old form with one of the most dominant first halves in years.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Darnold delivers for Vikings with career-high 347 yards and 5 TDs to beat Falcons, Cousins 42-21
item.description: Darnold added yet another highlight to his brilliant first season with the Vikings, passing for 347 yards and five touchdowns, both career highs, in a 42-21 victory over the foundering Falcons on Sunday to stretch their winning streak to six games.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utes drop first home game to St. Mary's, 72-63
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Runnin' Utes had won its first six home games by an average margin of 32 points. But they hadn't played a team as talented as Saint Mary's. The Gaels came into the Huntsman Center Saturday, and led by Paulius Murauskas, beat the utes, 72-63.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Chicago hosts conference rival Philadelphia
item.description: Philadelphia 76ers (6-15, 13th in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (10-14, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Sunday, 1 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: Nikola Vucevic and the Chicago Bulls take on Tyrese Maxey and the Philadelphia 76ers on Sunday. The Bulls are 8-7 in Eastern Conference games.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Dosunmu's first career triple-double leads Bulls 139-124 over Spurs
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Nikola Vucevic had a season-high 39 points, Ayo Dosunmu had 27 points, 11 assists and 10 rebounds and the Chicago Bulls beat the San Antonio Spurs 139-124 on Thursday night with Victor Wembanyama sidelined with a back injury.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: NHL to host free outdoor fan festival ahead of Winter Classic in Chicago
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The National Hockey League announced they will be hosting a free outdoor fan festival ahead of the Winter Classic in Chicago. The fan festival will begin at 10:30 a.m. on Tuesday, Dec. 31, in the Chicago Cubs parking lot at 1126 West Grace Street and run until 3:30 p.m. CT.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Batty, Ferrin named to All-Big 12 first team
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Three Cougars were named first-team All-Big 12 including defensive end Tyler Batty, offensive left tackle Caleb Etienne and kicker Will Ferrin. In addition, senior defensive back Jakob Robinson and junior kick returner Keelan Marion earned All-Big 12 Second Team honors.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Former White Sox player, analyst Bill Melton dies at 79
item.description: CHICAGO — "Beltin'" Bill Melton has died at the age of 79. According to a press release from the team, Melton died early Thursday morning in Phoenix after complications from a brief illness.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9
